headline: McCormick Draws Toms Capital As Unilever Food Deal Reshapes Value
summary: Toms Capital Investment Management has taken a significant stake in McCormick (NYSE: MKC). McCormick has announced plans to acquire Unilever's food business. The combination of an activist investor position and a major acquisition points to potential changes in operations and governance. McCormick, best known for its spices, seasonings and flavor solutions, sits at the center of everyday consumer food spending. The planned acquisition of Unilever's food business would expand that footprint,...
